beliefs.gloss: Naïve 1D patch sequencing loses 2D structure, necessitating 2D positional embeddings.
beliefs.evidence: Extending from 1D positional embedding to its 2D counterpart is beneficial: see Fig. 7(b)(c).

beliefs.gloss: Naïve 1D patch sequencing loses 2D structure, necessitating 2D positional embeddings.
beliefs.evidence: Extending from 1D positional embedding to its 2D counterpart is beneficial... observed in both (b) absolute and (c) relative positional embeddings.

beliefs.gloss: Naïve 1D patch sequencing loses 2D structure, necessitating 2D positional embeddings.
beliefs.evidence: replace the 2D ROPE... with a 1D ROPE and observe a degradation of 3.5 points... explicitly modeling positions in 2D is essential.

beliefs.gloss: Naïve 1D patch sequencing loses 2D structure, necessitating 2D positional embeddings.
beliefs.evidence: We empirically show that explicitly modeling positions in 2D is essential.

beliefs.gloss: Canvas patchification increases input diversity, reducing overfitting and encouraging spatial prior learning.
beliefs.evidence: each patch can cover multiple colors... which substantially enriches the data space for learning.

beliefs.gloss: Canvas patchification increases input diversity, reducing overfitting and encouraging spatial prior learning.
beliefs.evidence: if we naïvely treat each raw pixel as a token, there would be only C distinct tokens.

beliefs.gloss: Canvas enables augmentations, fostering translation/scale invariance for generalization.
beliefs.evidence: fully flexible translation augmentation on the canvas... yields an additional gain of 2.9 points.

beliefs.gloss: Canvas enables augmentations, fostering translation/scale invariance for generalization.
beliefs.evidence: scale augmentation enabled by the concept of canvas. Scale augmentation yields a substantial gain of 6.2 points.

beliefs.gloss: Canvas enables augmentations, fostering translation/scale invariance for generalization.
beliefs.evidence: ViT architecture has little to no inductive bias about scale invariance. This can explain why scale augmentation yields a substantial gain.

beliefs.gloss: Patchification/convolution introduces locality and translation invariance inductive biases.
beliefs.evidence: patchification... incorporates several critical inductive biases in vision: locality and translation invariance.

beliefs.gloss: Increasing model size improves accuracy by enabling better fitting.
beliefs.evidence: increasing depth and/or width leads to higher accuracy as a result of better fitting.

beliefs.gloss: Offline training enables learning visual common sense, improving TTT.
beliefs.evidence: offline training greatly improves the performance of TTT, suggesting that common sense about the visual world can be learned.
